meta.rootDescription: AinBondhu AI by Rahman's Associates is a bilingual legal work assistant for advocates in Bangladesh. Describe the matter in Bangla or English and get chamber-ready drafting help, structured guidance, and saved work in minutes.

disclaimer.text: This AI service is for drafting and research assistance only and does not replace professional legal advice.

hero.headline: Turn hours of chamber work into minutes with AinBondhu AI.
hero.description: Built by Rahman's Associates for advocates in Bangladesh, AinBondhu AI helps non-technical lawyers prepare notices, petitions, agreements, summaries, and daily drafting work in Bangla, English, or both.

plainLanguage.title: Write naturally
plainLanguage.description: No special wording or technical language required.

language.title: Bangla or English
language.description: Describe the matter in whichever language feels easier.

structure.title: Clearer legal structure
structure.description: AinBondhu AI turns the matter into a usable first draft, summary, and review points.

panel.description: A calm, chamber-ready assistant for daily legal drafting, structured guidance, and faster review.

structured.title: Drafts with structure
structured.description: Turns a plain request into usable drafting, review points, and missing-detail markers.

bilingual.title: Bangla, English, or both
bilingual.description: Accepts Bangla, English, and mixed input without requiring technical prompts.

workflow.title: Built for real chamber work
workflow.description: Helps reduce repetitive drafting time while keeping advocate review at the center.

features.title: A practical AI legal helper for real advocate work.
features.description: Built for everyday chamber and casework: simple requests, saved work, ready formats, and careful drafting support.
features.structuredDescription: Turn a short client instruction into organized legal help with Bangladesh context and clearly marked missing details.
features.libraryDescription: Start from prepared examples for notices, petitions, agreements, bail work, research, and client interviews.
features.workflowDescription: Keeps your work organized, protected, and clearly limited to assistance.

featuredTemplates.title: Start from ready legal formats.
featuredTemplates.description: The library includes Bangladesh-focused examples that can be copied directly or adapted inside the drafting help page.

demo.title: See how the AI assistant prepares your text.
demo.description: These examples show how plain-language requests become clear working text for Bangladesh legal work.

login.pageTitle: Access your {{brand}} saved work and drafting help.
login.pageDescription: Login to review saved work, mark useful items as favorites, and keep a searchable record for your Bangladesh legal practice.
login.cardDescription: Use your email and password to open the protected {{brand}} work area.
login.networkError: Login failed due to a network or server issue.

signup.pageTitle: Create an account to save your work and keep it organized.
signup.pageDescription: Guest use is available, but signed-in users can save work, search earlier text, and mark favorites for later use.
signup.cardDescription: Register for {{brand}} to save your work securely.
signup.networkError: Account creation failed due to a network or server issue.

generator.pageTitle: Describe the matter once. Get a usable legal draft in minutes.
generator.pageDescription: Choose the practice area, type of help, optional facts, and output language. AinBondhu AI prepares a practical first-pass result for Bangladeshi advocates.
generator.pageHelperText: Write the matter the way you would explain it in chamber. AinBondhu AI will organize it into clearer drafting support.
generator.cardDescription: Explain the legal task in Bangla, English, or mixed language. AinBondhu AI prepares a practical first draft, review summary, and next-step guidance.
generator.beginnerFriendlyText: No special wording is needed. Describe what you need in normal language and add only the details you already have.
generator.sampleRequestsTitle: Use one of these examples if you want a faster start.
generator.sampleRequestsDescription: Select an example to fill the form, then edit it for your own matter.
generator.accordionTitle: Work through the drafting form step by step.
generator.accordionDescription: Open each section, add what you know, and move to the next part when ready.
generator.requestPlaceholder: Example: Draft a bail application for my client and mark missing facts clearly.
generator.requestHelp: Write naturally in Bangla or English. AinBondhu AI keeps the legal objective clear and prepares chamber-ready text for Bangladesh practice.
generator.requestSectionDescription: Say what document, notice, petition, or research help you need. Simple language is enough.
generator.factsPlaceholder: Add the relevant chronology, allegations, client position, and important facts.
generator.factsSectionDescription: Add facts, case title, court name, or law only if you have them. This part is optional but helpful.
generator.lawPlaceholder: Optional: mention statutes, sections, rules, or ordinances to consider.
generator.outputSectionDescription: Choose the output language and tone. You can ask for Bengali, English, or a bilingual result.
generator.shortcutsDescription: Start from a ready format or use one as the base for your work.
generator.outputDescription: Review the generated result, copy it, download it, or prepare another version.
generator.savedMessage: This draft was saved in your dashboard.
generator.unsavedMessage: Sign-in was detected, but this draft could not be saved.
generator.emptyDescription: After you submit, AinBondhu AI will stream the result here so you can review it in real time.

beginnerTips.first: Describe the legal task the way you would normally explain it.
beginnerTips.second: Use an example if you are unsure how to start.
beginnerTips.third: Add extra facts only when you already have them.

emptyTips.first: Say what document or legal task you need.
emptyTips.second: Add facts or law only if you have them.
emptyTips.third: Choose the language and prepare the text.

generator.generateFailed: The draft could not be prepared.
generator.regenerateFailed: The draft could not be prepared again.

suggestions.first: Draft a bail application for my client and keep all missing facts clearly marked.
suggestions.second: I need a legal notice demanding payment of outstanding money.
suggestions.third: Prepare a bilingual demand notice for cheque dishonour in Bangladesh.
suggestions.fourth: Prepare client interview questions for a family maintenance dispute.

dashboard.pageTitle: Review saved work, favorites, and recent drafting help.
dashboard.pageDescription: Every signed-in result is saved so you can search earlier work, reuse useful text, and keep your practice more consistent.
dashboard.searchPlaceholder: Search by request, legal category, type of help, or content
dashboard.favoritePromptsDescription: Quick access to the work you use most often.
dashboard.promptHistoryDescription: Search through the drafting help saved to your account.
dashboard.deleteFailed: Could not delete the saved text.
dashboard.noMatchTitle: No saved work matches your search.
dashboard.noMatchDescription: Prepare new text or clear the search term to see your full saved work.

templates.pageDescription: Search, filter, copy, and open prepared examples covering criminal, civil, family, property, commercial, labour, writ, banking, cyber, notice, and contract work.
templates.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, category, or purpose
templates.promptDescription: Copy this format directly or use it as a starting point in drafting help.

notFound.title: The requested page was not found.
notFound.description: The page may have moved, or it may not be available right now in {{brand}}.

rahmansAssociates.pageDescription: Owner of Rahman's Associates, long-serving public officer, law enthusiast, and current legal learner preparing to serve Bangladesh through law.
rahmansAssociates.portraitCaption: Portrait placeholder for Md. Saidur Rahman
rahmansAssociates.profileText: Md. Saidur Rahman is the owner of Rahman's Associates. He has been studying law since 2016 and has remained deeply committed to the law sector of Bangladesh from the core. After more than 35 years of service in Government Non-Formal Education, he now brings his knowledge, discipline, and public-service mindset to legal work.

stats.retirementLabel: Retired from Bureau of Non-Formal Education

education.title: Education
education.intro: His academic background combines statistics and legal study, shaping a careful and analytical approach to legal work.

timeline.title: Career timeline
timeline.intro: A steady journey shaped by public service, discipline, and long-standing interest in law.
timeline.studyDescription: Began studying law and continued building a grounded understanding of Bangladeshi law from its core.
timeline.serviceDescription: Served in the Government sector in Non-Formal Education for more than 35 years with sustained public-service responsibility.
timeline.retirementTitle: Deputy Director, Bureau of Non-Formal Education, Bangladesh
timeline.retirementDescription: Retired as Deputy Director and now stands ready to contribute his knowledge to the law sector of Bangladesh.
timeline.currentDescription: He is preparing himself for Bar-at-Law in order to serve the country with stronger legal capability.

service.title: Public-service background
service.description: His long government career reflects administrative experience, patience, responsibility, and a citizen-focused mindset that now informs his legal journey.

journey.title: Legal journey
journey.description: He has remained a law enthusiast throughout his career. Since 2016, he has continued legal study with a clear purpose: to contribute meaningfully to the law sector of Bangladesh.

philosophy.title: Core philosophy
philosophy.quote: Make the advocate work in a smart way, not in a hard way.
philosophy.explanation: That philosophy also guides AinBondhu AI: practical support, faster drafting, clearer structure, and respect for the advocate's own judgment.

bilingual.title: Bilingual presentation
bilingual.description: Chamber work in Bangladesh often moves between Bangla and English. AinBondhu AI follows that reality so legal professionals can work in the language that fits the matter.
bilingual.banglaQuote: আইনজীবীর কাজ কঠিনভাবে নয়, বুদ্ধিমত্তার সঙ্গে এগিয়ে নিতে হবে।

cta.title: Continue with AinBondhu AI
cta.description: Use the drafting assistant to turn routine chamber work into faster, more organized legal output.

auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.passwordMax: Password must be 128 characters or fewer.
auth.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
auth.nameMax: Name must be 80 characters or fewer.

prompt.requestMin: Describe the legal task in at least 10 characters.
prompt.requestMax: Request must be {{count}} characters or fewer.

api.accountExists: An account with this email already exists.
api.registrationFailed: Registration failed due to a server error.
api.promptUnexpected: Could not prepare the text due to an unexpected server error.

criminalLaw.label: Criminal Law
criminalLaw.description: Bail, complaints, defense preparation, and trial-stage drafting.

civilLaw.label: Civil Law
civilLaw.description: Suits, plaints, written statements, and civil procedure research.

familyLaw.label: Family Law
familyLaw.description: Marriage, divorce, maintenance, guardianship, and custody matters.

propertyLaw.label: Property Law
propertyLaw.description: Land disputes, partition, title review, deeds, and possession issues.

corporateCommercialLaw.label: Corporate / Commercial Law
corporateCommercialLaw.description: Commercial contracts, governance, compliance, and business disputes.

labourLaw.label: Labour Law
labourLaw.description: Employment discipline, service disputes, and labour court preparation.

constitutionalWrit.label: Constitutional / Writ
constitutionalWrit.description: Writ petitions, public law issues, and constitutional remedies.

bankingChequeDishonour.label: Banking / Cheque Dishonour
bankingChequeDishonour.description: Cheque dishonour complaints, recovery strategy, and banking notices.

cyberCrime.label: Cyber Crime
cyberCrime.description: Digital offences, complaints, incident chronology, and cyber compliance.

legalNotice.label: Legal Notice
legalNotice.description: Demand notices, response notices, and pre-litigation positioning.

contractAgreement.label: Contract / Agreement
contractAgreement.description: Agreement preparation, clause review, and negotiation support.

drafting.label: Drafting
drafting.description: Help prepare formal legal documents in a clear structure.

legalResearch.label: Legal Research
legalResearch.description: Organize research needs with Bangladesh practice in mind.

caseSummary.label: Case Summary
caseSummary.description: Summarize the matter, key questions, and present stage clearly.

petition.label: Petition
petition.description: Help prepare formal petitions and applications.

bailApplication.label: Bail Application
bailApplication.description: Specialized help for bail grounds and court-ready structure.

legalNotice.label: Legal Notice
legalNotice.description: Draft assertive but professional pre-litigation notices.

agreementDraft.label: Agreement Draft
agreementDraft.description: Help prepare complete agreements or clause review work.

clientInterviewQuestions.label: Client Interview Questions
clientInterviewQuestions.description: Prepare client questions to surface missing legal facts.

english.label: English
english.description: The prepared text will be in English.

bangla.label: Bangla
bangla.description: The prepared text will be in Bangla.

bilingual.label: Bilingual
bilingual.description: Use Bangla and English together where that helps legal clarity.

detailed.label: Detailed
detailed.description: Adds clearer parts, extra detail, and marked blanks for missing information.

concise.label: Concise
concise.description: Compact and efficient while preserving key legal structure.
